articles.description: England face Pakistan in the ICC T20 World Cup in Pallekele - follow live scores, radio commentary and video highlights.
articles.title: England vs Pakistan LIVE: ICC T20 World Cup 2026 - cricket score, radio & video highlights

articles.description: Tottenham's heavy north London derby defeat against Arsenal on Sunday just confirmed what everyone already knew - Igor Tudor's team are in serious trouble. BBC Sport assesses their precarious situation, what relegation might bring and asks if they are too big to go down?
articles.title: Tottenham relegation fight: Are north London club too big to go down?

articles.description: Up to fourth in the Premier League after Monday's win at Everton, Champions League qualification would be a big boost to Manchester United's finances after two years outside Europe's elite club competition.
articles.title: Man Utd: Why Champions League return is crucial to Old Trafford club

articles.description: Real Madrid goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois says Vinicius Jr's celebration against Benfica in last week's Champions League tie does not "justify a suspected act of racism".
articles.title: Gianluca Prestianni ban: Thibaut Courtois says Vinicius Jr's celebration does not justify racist abuse

articles.description: The combination of Adrian Newey, Honda and Fernando Alonso was highly promising but Aston Martin are in trouble. Andrew Benson explains why.
articles.title: Aston Martin: Why they are in trouble before 2026 season starts

articles.description: Paris St-Germain defender Achraf Hakimi says he is set to face trial after an allegation of rape was made against him.
articles.title: Achraf  Hakimi: Paris St-Germain defender to face trial after rape allegation

articles.description: Former England coach Eddie Jones says the team's defeat by Ireland left him feeling sick as it brought back memories of the end of his own time in charge.
articles.title: Eddie Jones: England's defeat to Ireland recalled end of my era

articles.description: As Everton's home form continues to struggle, BBC Sport takes a closer look at the curse of the new stadium in the Premier League era.
articles.title: Are Everton showing how Premier League clubs struggle after moving stadiums?

articles.description: Rio Ngumoha on life at Liverpool, his mindset when he comes off the bench and his discussions with manager Arne Slot.
articles.title: Rio Ngumoha: I want to show everyone what I can do for Liverpool

articles.description: Sacked New Zealand coach Scott Robertson will return to rugby by taking charge of the invitational side this summer.
articles.title: Scot Robertson: Sacked All Black coach to lead Barbarians
